_meta.bank_holiday_note: Today (04/05/2026) is the Early May Bank Holiday (UK/Ireland). No Slack messages today across any monitored channel — all channels last active 29/04–01/05. No meetings. Five developers worked despite the bank holiday: Novica Vukobratovic and Harden Thomas Wallace both advanced multiple tickets. Sanja Budic updated API documentation in Confluence. Slack fully quiet today.
_meta.calendar_note: Microsoft 365 authentication pending — OAuth flow initiated but callback URL not yet received. To enable full calendar access, complete the M365 OAuth flow using the auth URL below, then paste the localhost callback URL into chat and call mcp__Microsoft-365__complete_authentication.
_meta.confluence_note: CQL with 'lastModified >= today' returned 400 (known issue from afternoon report). Used 'lastModified > 2026-05-03' successfully — returned 20 results. Most activity today is in non-GDC spaces (Spotlight Vegas, Content, Commercial Team). Key GDC-space item: Sanja Budic updated Matrix & OddsFeeds API documentation.

achievements.description: GDCU-8877 Add Field to Manage Phone Numbers on Email Confirmation Pages in Admin Panel (Novica Vukobratovic) moved to In QA at 11:11 BST — implementation complete despite bank holiday. Scope: per-URL toggle in admin panel to show/hide mandatory phone number field on /e and /p confirmation pages without impacting other geos or pages. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Corey Cunningham.

GDCU-8865 Implement Game/Software Provider Names and Improve Sizing for Slot Games Hub (Harden Thomas Wallace) moved to In QA at 16:37 BST — game name and provider labels implemented below each slot tile and sizing updated (w-[150px] → w-[200px], h=auto w=900) per Miguel Migneco's Figma prototype. Ready for QA across all devices and browsers. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Ciara Carroll, Chloe Christie, Miguel Migneco, Jessica Dordevic, Eoin McCarthy.

GDCU-7363 Slots Widget Minor Filter Issues bug (Novica Vukobratovic) moved to In QA at 13:15 BST — bug fixes complete for cursor pointer on filter selection, Clear All button formatting, and active filter highlight colour (matching the strategy page blue style) on gambling.com/uk/online-casinos/slots/games.

GDCU-8849 Add New Expert Carousel Style to Author Carousel Shortcode (Harden Thomas Wallace) moved to In Progress at 16:37 BST — active development started on the new 'expertCarousel' style option, based on Miguel Migneco's Figma prototype (GDCU-8880 design). Adds optional 'style' parameter accepting 'authorCarousel' (default) or 'expertCarousel'. Circular author images sourced from Origins. Stakeholders: Miguel Migneco, Mike Pett, Chloe Christie, Eoin McCarthy.

GDCU-8611 Update 'Feature' Tag styling (Novica Vukobratovic) moved to In Progress at 13:19 BST — implementing new design-system-aligned Feature and Opinion label styles from the GDC Design System Figma file. Replaces the grey 'Feature' label/gold star with cleaner design across news listings, article pages, category pages, and all widgets. Stakeholders: Eoin McCarthy, Gabriel Cornoiu, Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith.

Sanja Budic updated 'Matrix & OddsFeeds — API Usage on gambling.com' documentation in Confluence (GDC space) — comprehensive API reference covering Matrix API (sports events/tips: auth token flow, endpoints) and OddsFeeds API (horse racing). Directly relevant background reading for GDCU-8895 Prediction Market US Sitemap work, which is currently in Mike's review queue.

_meeting_note: No meetings today — Early May Bank Holiday (UK/Ireland). All meetings suspended. No Confluence meeting notes found for 04/05. No Slack meeting threads found. First full team day back: Tuesday 05/05/2026.

action_points.action: URGENT — Reply to Jessica Dordevic DM (30 Apr 15:05 BST): 'Let me know about the banners please so I'll check with Ciara after.' Jessica is actively iterating on GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners and is waiting on Mike's go-ahead to close the ticket. Previously confirmed: pass/interested buttons hide after match; remove 'betting' from label. Outstanding: formally confirm the banner designs are approved so Jessica can move GDCU-8928 to Done. First action Tuesday morning.

REVIEW & SIGN OFF — GDCU-8895 Prediction Market Page Not on US Sitemap (Sanja Budic, High, In Product since ~01/05). Sanja also updated the Matrix & OddsFeeds API documentation today — useful background context. Review: Prediction header added to US sitemap, /us/prediction-markets linked, Prediction Reviews logic in place, NOT listed under any 'Betting' headers (compliance requirement). Colin Brannigan is a stakeholder. Sign off or provide feedback Tuesday.

ESCALATE — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign (Ciara Carroll) is Blocked for Day 19 (since 16/04/2026). Longest-standing open blocker on the board. Note from #gdc-high-agency (01/04): Ciara created 18 operator list design variations using Claude Design, pushing back to Figma. This suggests design solutions may now exist — chase Ciara first thing Tuesday to confirm whether the blocker can be cleared immediately. If not resolved by end of day Tuesday, escalate to Colin Brannigan.

DECISION NEEDED — Respond to Joshua Smith in #gdc-product-design-pod (01/05 09:23 BST) re: GDCU-8787 Carousel Banner Shortcode. Two options: (A) Reuse Simple Banner shortcode + navigation arrows — Joshua's preference, reduces editor complexity, mockup created; (B) Use Free Games banner style — different layout, cannot reuse existing shortcode. Mike is a stakeholder. Reply to Joshua's message Tuesday morning with the design direction call.

NOTE — Miguel Migneco is OFF tomorrow Tuesday 05/05 (confirmed DM 30/04). GDCU-8849 Author Carousel Shortcode is now In Progress with Harden Thomas Wallace implementing Miguel's Figma prototype — no dependency on Miguel's presence. Verify no other In-Product or review-queue items are blocked pending Miguel before EOD today.

WELCOME BACK — Vic Dadson returns Tuesday 05/05 from ~2 weeks sick leave (off since ~21/04). Schedule a brief welfare check-in for Tuesday morning. Review Vic's ticket assignments and backlog before the call. Outstanding prior item: data engineering options discussion. No In-Product tickets currently assigned to Vic — she should be able to hit the ground running.

SIGN OFF — GDCU-8736 Learning Hub Imagery (Ciara Carroll, Medium, In Product since 28/04 — Day 6). Ciara shared Figma prototype including new Myth Buster tile imagery. Chloe noted 'some back and forth' at sprint close 30/04. Mike's sign-off unblocks Carlos Blauth on GDCU-8733 Apply Feedback to Learning Hub. Check with Ciara Tuesday what outstanding feedback remains, then close.

CHECK IN — GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic, In Progress). Active DM collaboration 30/04 — Jessica making updates per Mike's direction (hide pass/interested buttons after match, remove 'betting' from label). Chloe expected Jessica to close this shortly at sprint close. Confirm with Jessica Tuesday whether she is ready to move to In Product.

AMPLIFY — Publicly endorse and amplify Ciara Carroll's Claude Design Guidelines announcement in #core-product (29/04 15:49 BST) and #gdc-pod. The guidelines are comprehensive: team etiquette for all roles, live design system at gamblingcom-brand.netlify.app, dos/don'ts. GDCU-8893 is Done. A visible endorsement from Mike in both channels this week reinforces the Claude Design rollout and validates Ciara's work.

FOLLOW UP — GDCU-8879 Genesis Brand Carousel Component Card (Jessica Dordevic, In Progress). Carried into Sprint 170 (Chloe, 30/04). Bounced from In Product on 29/04 — outstanding: confirm logo name/size is sourced from Origins in Figma (Chloe's feedback). Check with Jessica Tuesday where this stands and when it will be ready for review.

MONITOR — GDCU-8877 Add Phone Numbers Field (Novica Vukobratovic) is now In QA as of 11:11 today. No PM action required yet. Be ready to review when QA passes or surfaces issues. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Corey Cunningham, Eoin McCarthy.

MONITOR — GDCU-8865 Slot Games Hub Provider Names and Sizing (Harden Thomas Wallace) is now In QA as of 16:37 today. No PM action required until QA completes. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Ciara Carroll, Chloe Christie, Miguel Migneco, Jessica Dordevic, Eoin McCarthy.

DM GABRIEL CORNOIU — Stakeholder intake form questions still unresolved since 23/04: (1) should there be an 'Other' option in the offer ordering dropdown? (2) does 'new ordering structure required' mean a new OpList? Gabriel posted on 01/05 that he was free most of the morning for DMs. First thing Tuesday — send DM to close both questions.

CREATIVE DIRECTION — GDCU-8846 Cosmo Spins Spring Ad Campaign (Ciara Carroll, To Do). Josh Kerr feedback: needs rethinking — clearer message, less 'gaming' feel. Creative direction required from Mike before Ciara can proceed. With Ciara returning from bank holiday carrying GDCU-8619 (Blocked), GDCU-8736, GDCU-8947 (Cosmo Cash Machine Images), provide direction early this week so it doesn't stall.

CREATE UX TICKET — GDCU-8903 Sports Quiz Hub (Backlog) requires a UX pre-requisite ticket before dev work can begin. Ticket explicitly states: 'The UX ticket (design handoff) must be completed and approved before this ticket is actioned.' Pre-req still not created. Raise in next sprint planning or create now to unblock the pipeline.
